_comment: Fields here have no reliable free/public daily-updating source with exact tenor-level data. Values are the best real-sourced or reasoned-estimate figures found via research — each is tagged 'real' (directly sourced, cite given) or 'estimated' (derived from a general range/typical spread, not an exact CCIL/FBIL print — flagged, not fabricated as precise). Replace 'estimated' fields with real terminal/CRISIL/FBIL data whenever available. Update 'as_of' whenever you change a value.

nifty50_pe_5yr_median.source: real — multiple aggregator sites (primeinvestor.in, indiamacroindicators.co.in) citing 5yr median Nifty50 PE

nifty50_pe_10yr_median.source: real — same aggregator sources, 10yr average Nifty50 PE (note: NSE switched standalone→consolidated earnings in Apr 2021, so pre/post comparability is imperfect)

midcap150_pe_5yr_median.source: real — cited in ET Money/aggregator commentary on Midcap150 forward-PE overvaluation (one other source (indexpe.in) shows 21.6 for the same metric — flagged discrepancy, using the more directly-cited figure)

midcap150_pe_10yr_median.source: estimated — no clean 10yr figure found; estimated as slightly below the 5yr median (27.25) since broad-market PE compression is typical over a longer window. Replace when a real 10yr figure is found.

smallcap250_current_pe.source: real — trendlyne.com / indexpe.in (fallback only — latest.json.valuation.small_cap.pe is primary)

smallcap250_pb.source: real — screener.in, stale (most recent found), refresh when a same-day figure is available

smallcap250_div_yield.source: NOT FOUND — genuinely no source surfaced this run, left null rather than guessed

smallcap250_pe_5yr_median.source: real — indexpe.in/trendlyne.com 5yr average PE for Smallcap 250

smallcap250_pe_10yr_median.source: estimated — no clean 10yr figure found; estimated slightly below the 5yr average (27.0) and 7yr median (29.96) for the same reason as Midcap150. Replace when a real 10yr figure is found.

aaa_corp_10yr.source: estimated — within the commonly-cited 7.30-7.50% range for India AAA 10Y corporate bonds (multiple aggregator sources); India 10Y G-Sec is 6.71%, implying ~65-70bps AAA spread, consistent with typical spreads

aaa_corp_5yr.source: estimated — derived from AAA 10Y (7.40%) minus typical ~20bps term slope; no exact CCIL/FIMMDA 5Y print found this run

aaa_corp_3yr.source: estimated — same method, ~35bps below AAA 10Y; no exact tenor print found this run

aaa_corp_1yr.source: estimated — same method, ~50bps below AAA 10Y; no exact tenor print found this run

aa_corp_3yr.source: estimated — AAA 3Y (7.05%) + ~50bps typical AA-over-AAA spread for 3Y tenor; no exact tenor print found this run

aa_corp_1yr.source: estimated — AAA 1Y (6.90%) + ~45bps typical AA-over-AAA spread for 1Y tenor; no exact tenor print found this run

cd_12m.source: estimated — FBIL publishes this daily at 5:30pm IST but today's exact number wasn't surfaced in search; estimated near AAA 1Y corp levels, typical for 12M bank CDs

cd_3m.source: estimated — same FBIL-not-surfaced caveat; short-tenor CDs typically price close to the repo rate (5.25%) plus a modest money-market premium

call_rate.source: real — RBI repo rate is 5.25% (unchanged for 3rd straight MPC meeting as of June 2026) and WACR has been reported 'edging closer to the repo rate'; using repo rate as the best available proxy for today's overnight call rate absent a same-day RBI print

t_repo.source: estimated — T-Repo typically trades a few bps below the call rate/repo rate; no exact same-day CCIL print found this run
